creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
We had an early Christmas/year-end lunch date at Chef Gordon Ramsay’s Bread Street Kitchen! This has been on our Restaurant Bucket List for so long, and we’re thrilled to finally tick it off this 2024! 

📍 @atlantisthepalm 
🍴 @breadstreetkitchendubai is famous for traditional British fare and Chef @gordongram signature Beef Wellington. Of course, Ed ordered the iconic dish while I opted for Lobster Tagliolini. Both are in sharing portions, well-plated, and rich in flavor. We also had Crab on Toast, Spicy Tuna Tartare, and Chocolate Fondant. Prices are expectedly on the higher end, but don’t we all deserve a luxurious meal this December? 🥰
💰 Approximate spend for 2: 500 AED
🎄 Christmas dining offers start at 350 AED for a 3-course meal.  Please check Atlantis website for details.

Save this for your holiday date!

Atlantis The Palm • Bread Street Kitchen • Dubai Restaurant • Lady and her Sweet Escapes • Christmas in Dubai • #BreadStreetKitchen

transcription.text: When December comes, I bet you want to Wrap me all up and take me home with you See what I look like under them lights We'll keep it quiet, whatever we do I'm just tryna keep my baby warm till the winter time
